column1: Hey Parker, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
my b I missed your response!
I got you tho, which destination were you lookin to book?
Punta cana, we aren't positive how many people are coming it depends on the pricing
My birthday is the 9th so we want to be there for that if it's possible
okay bet yea I'll be in Punta Cana too actually. will be dope to celebrate the bday
which school do you all go to
fire we got a bunch of Florida schools rollin with us
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things started for the squad?
after I get the price and information about what the package includes hoping to get it settled within the next week
heard you! I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
bet whats the best email to send to
Have u been to punta for spreak before? how is it?
I go every year bro. its lit
this vid is basically the whole trips vibe https://youtu.be/XbgROM_7E2Y
gonna send you an email with pricing too btw
yea just sent that over lmk if you got it
i got it, is that price per person right?
and how would the rooms work
yea per person. rooms fit up to 4 ppl, you choose your roommates
each person gets their own account and handles their own payments
okay and is there any hidden fees or anything i should worry about on top of the price
Nahhh we don't roll like that lol
so if one of my friends doesn't know if she wants to come yet is there a date she can get refunded until?
thats all in, only thing I could say is potentially a refundable damage deposit hold at checkin
so she couldn't pay and then get rufuneded by a certain time?
if she adds the travel protection insurance, she can cancel any time for any reason
if theres a slight chance she needs to cancel I recommend she gets it
okay, and so with excursions is there a company to go through? or do you guys get deals say if we wanted to do ATVs or a sunset cruise
we have an open bar booze cruise that a lot of our groups go on. that you can add right onto your package with us. for things like ATVs, you add those on site right at the resort concierge desk
which hotel do u usually stay at
i stay at the occidental punta cana, i sent it in the quote def recommend
we host a bunch of beach/pool parties for y'all and bring djs for the whole week
and throw down at the on resort club, its lit
u don't have to be 21 right
yerr Peter whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
Parker bro lol my bad, typing fast
we r all goin to talk abt it tn but seems pretty good
aight bet bet. lmk if you want help lookin for flights
when is the deadline for the tri
its just when it sells out, it sells out
is it close to selling out
I dont thave access to the full inventory, it kinda happens randomly
so would just say the sooner the better
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which package we wanna roll with?
hi we are just waiting for one more to confirm
hey all good, just a heads up availability is def running low, dont want you guys missing out lol
if a couple of us want to buy it rn bc we are ready, and then a couple want to wait to wait are we able to still be in the same rooms and stuff?
yea 100%, we can always add people in later on as long as we have rooms left
two rn i'm asking if any one is ready
ok cool lmk, i can get you a reservation started lock you guys in
hey Parker checkin in, did we want to secure that package?
yoo ill check now, how many ppl are ready to roll as of now
we rollin with 4 nights, or 5 nights?
word I'll start working on getting that set up. is march 7-11 cool
most come in on the 7th or 8th for your week
as long as we are there for my b day
bet. will get this sent over in 10
the other guys, we may be adding them on later?
i'm abt to go to a workout class but i'll look at us as soon as im done
I emailed that reservation over btw, whenever you get to it after workout
there is actually 4 of us ready to do it
is that going o change what u sent me
yea will update that same link

OK and the four of us that are ready to pay now are going to share a room and I told the other girls that I would give them your phone number so they can set it up with you because honestly planning this trip for everyone has given me gray hair at 19
Aight just have them shoot me a text and I'll add them in as we go. Just make sure they lmk they're with you so I know who they are
sup Parker were y'all able to get onto the reservation
hey checkin in, we still plan on securing that room?
ya i'm so sorry i need lik two days
Ah! Aight, here if you need anything just lmk
all set to go for the four of us, can you resend me the email
okay bet! if anyone needs help with anything just lmk I'm around
hi i think the 2nd room is abt ready
Hey okay cool. I'll get that open in a few mins
and can I give you their email so you can send it to them directly?
yea I got you whats their email

if they decided to add a fourth later, would they be able to do that and get a couple dollars back or would they not be able to do that at all or would they still have to pay for the three person room?
we can add a fourth later as long as we have the availability. would just have to be sooner than later
its a $24 difference, they would get reimbursed
Loved “its a $24 difference, they would get reimbursed”
sup Parker any update on the two ppl that will be joining your room
One of them is waiting to get paid
okay, and the other? just wanna get y'all processed as soon as we can
I don't think she can come w er trying to find another 4th
cool keep me posted soon as possible
and if there's anyway that you can refund julia for the three person since she staying with four people now and should only be paying the 646 if that's possible
hey, so Julia is moving to your room?
Julia is moving to my room And the second room will still only have 3 people
okay, Julia's getting move now, and then room 2 will one person currently. are there supposed to be two more joining
So room two should have. 3 people total
Yes so roxanne and her friend should be signing up within the next couple days
Cool, got you. do mind checking with them soon as possible, operations teams been on my back about open slots
All good! not sure she did, I remember you sent me her email and I sent the package info to her. but that was it
kk and where do we send the flight info?
Right into your account, when youre logged in, theres a flight info tab
Loved “Right into your account, when youre logged in, theres a flight info tab”
hi, so about the party pass does that include transportation there and back and drinks at the club? And how much is it?
yea it comes with transportation to the clubs and back! open bar, express entry, cover charge
the nightclubs are Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, and Maroca Nightclub. and the open bar booze cruise
3 event pass bundle is $200. you can also add the events individually within your account
So for 200 you only get three events
yea. these are open bar events, unlimited drinks
So would it be like the booze cruise and two clubs, or is it booze cruise and three clubs
booze cruise counts as an event. so if you did that it'll be a booze cruise and 2 clubs
and do u know how much the usual cover is for the clubs
Yea so these spots aren't like generally open to the public since our main events are on weekdays. Most ppl travel on on the weekends
So like it's not like a club night you can walk up to. They're hosted night specifically for sports break travelers
sup Parker! when you can, can you start adding our flight info onto your accounts
oh that's weird i tried adding mine already
ah! did you have trouble getting it in?
i thought it was already in
I didnt see it there. are you on the same flight as anyone else?
is there anyway i can send it to you and you can do it?
who else are you on the same flight as? jayda, julia, roxanne?
camryn and i are on the same flight as them
lol I got you! you'll get an email soon with the itinerary and more details too
lookin forward to havin y'all out there with us
I need to call us asap
some people in our group are nervous it's a scam
we need to be sent the recipients of the rooms
hey Parker, down to hop on a call
you can let them know its not a scam though. you all are fully booked and confirmed
Julia keeps asking me abt it
cool no prob. pretty sure Julia and I texted before?
yes she is in my room rn drinking and she sad that her parents r nervous it is a scam
I'll gladly talk to her parents whenever she wants
I'm literally gonna be out there with you all on the 7th lol
ik she just up my ass
all good just let her know she can text me tomorrow
for my birthday i want to do a nice dinner is there any place u recommend or anything
Yall cool with going off the resort? Super dope restaurants about a 10 min ride away
Yea you'll be fine. Can take a taxi van right from the resort and get dropped off right in front of the restaurant
There's a spot called Noah that I really ljke
Can you send me the link to the place?
is there like. a party boat we could rent for my birthday?
is this a good one do u know?
hey, spoke to Julia, if you want to do that id def recommend doing the booze cruise with us so that your on a party boat with a bunch of our other travelers
this is what our booze cruise vibe is like https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Is4RzNfxeZg
yo Parker! is Nathalie or Chesna on the same flight as anyone else in the group
cc is on our flight you'll have to ask roxy abt her friend
word. cc I'm assuming is Chesna?
Hey are our rooms going to be ready as soon as we get there?
Potentially, but the time you get to the resort it'll be 1230. If rooms aren't ready you'll still be able to come on the resort and chill drink eat pool etc til rooms are ready
Can you go ahead and book the boat trip for march 9th
or send me where i can do that
to where like they pick u up at the resort
yea since you fly in today lets jus take care of it when y'all get here. when y'all get in let my homie Taylor know youre looking to add the booze cruise and she'll tell you exactly what to do
hey yea since you fly in today lets jus take care of it when y'all get here. when y'all get in let my homie Taylor know youre looking to add the booze cruise and she'll tell you exactly what to do
safe travels tho, see y'all when you get out here
maybe we should switch it idk we can talk abt it when we arrived
Word yea I would recommend doing the cruise with us, way more since it's a a bunch of other spring breakers. More of a party
dope, y'all at the resort yet?
do h know which spots have lik good good

the food here is aight, not the greatest but not the worst. you'll want to. make reservations at the specialty restaurants as much as you can. ask Taylor or any of the other staff in the lobby how to do so
they said we can only do two at a time
got you. the main dining area is the best spot overall, late night theres pizza and tacos on the 2nd level thats pretty good
what is the mexican place called?
the lady we talked to was very unhelpful
what's a good place to go out on the resort?
okay is there like a theme or something or do we need tickets and what time
hey my b I missed this but Mangú doesn't usually have themes just a reg club night and its free for everyone stayin here. we'll have our DJs there tonight again def come by
